00:15. Action: Move to pot. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean). pot is on the left of potato. pot is on top of third countertop. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:18. Action: Pick up pot. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:21. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:22. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:23. Action: Put pot on third countertop. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is on top of third countertop. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:26. Action: Toggle on faucet. Visual observation: faucet (turned on), pot (empty and clean), sink. pot is on top of third countertop. nothing is inside robot gripper. Auditory observation: water runs in sink.
00:29. Action: Toggle off faucet. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is on top of third countertop. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:32. Action: Pick up pot. Visual observation: house plant (empty), pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. house plant is on the left of soap bottle. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:34. Action: Move to house plant. Visual observation: house plant (empty), pot (empty and clean), sink. house plant is on the left of soap bottle. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:36. Action: Move to house plant. Visual observation: house plant (empty), pot (empty and clean), sink. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.

[Observation at the end of 00:37]
Action: Pour liquid from pot into house plant. Visual observation: house plant (empty), pot (empty and clean), sink. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.

Q: Infer from [Robot actions and observations before 00:37] or [Observation at the end of 00:37], briefly explain what happened at 00:37 and what caused the failure.
A:

response: At 00:37, the robot tried to pour from the pot into the house plant, but the pot was still empty, so nothing was watered. The failure was caused earlier at 00:23–00:29, when the pot was placed on the countertop instead of in/under the sink faucet, so turning on the faucet never filled it.
